gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Examination AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.RF < 20 AND T1.Thrombosis = 0
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) 
FROM Patient AS T1
INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID
INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T1.ID = T3.ID
WHERE T2.RF = '-' AND T3.Thrombosis = 0
question: How many patients with a normal RF don't have thrombosis?
